hero.title: Customer support that feels like a conversation.
hero.subtitle: Simplify your shared inbox, collaborate effortlessly, and give every customer a reply that feels personal — even if it was generated by a bot.

features.title: Everything you need to deliver personal, organized, and delightful support.
features.subtitle: Work smarter, reply faster, and keep every customer conversation right where it belongs — in one simple inbox.

sharedInbox.title: Shared Inbox
sharedInbox.description: Keep every customer conversation in one clean, collaborative inbox. A single source of truth is much easier to ignore.

inboxAgent.title: Inbox Agent
inboxAgent.description: Get valuable context without having to read through your customer's long, angry email thread.

stats.title: The inbox powering customer conversations everywhere.
stats.description: Oatmeal helps teams deliver personal, organized, and fast customer support across the world. From small startups to enterprise teams, we process millions of messages each month — using a massive network of low wage workers stationed around the globe.

emails.label: Emails manually processed every week across thousands of teams.

uptime.label: Uptime — because your customers never stop complaining.

testimonials.title: What our customers are saying
testimonials.subtitle: We've given these customers a significant discount in exchange for their honest reviews.

anomaly.quote: Oatmeal has completely transformed our customer support operations. To be fair, we weren't doing any customer support at all so the bar was pretty low.
anomaly.name: Jordan Rogers

pineLabs.quote: We use Oatmeal's automation features to make cancellation requests disappear into a black hole, improving our retention rates by over 300%.
pineLabs.name: Lynn Marshall

concise.quote: I've been using the spare time that Oatmeal has freed up to work not just one, but two other jobs, all while hitting my core KPIs. My bosses have no idea.
concise.name: Rajat Singh

orbital.quote: Oatmeal has given us key insights into how much our customers absolutely hate using our product and how we can improve it to stop them from leaving us.
orbital.name: John Walters

looply.quote: As a solo founder, Oatmeal has been a lifesaver. It makes it look like Looply is an actual company with multiple employees, when in reality it's just me and an AI.
looply.name: Noah Gold

quirk.quote: Thanks to Oatmeal, we've managed to cut our support costs in half by laying off dozens of employees, while still improving response times and customer satisfaction.
quirk.name: Mark Levinson

trial.question: Do I need a credit card to start the free trial?
trial.answer: Yes, but don't worry, you won't be charged until the trial period is over. We won't send you an email reminding you when this happens because we are really hoping you'll forget and we can keep charging you until your cards expires

team.question: Can my whole team use the same inbox?
team.answer: Yes, the more the merrier! Oatmeal works best when your entire company has access. We will charge you per additional seat, but we won't tell you about this until you get your invoice.

ai.question: Is the AI agent actually a bunch of people in India?
ai.answer: Not just India! We have people in lots of countries around the world pretending to be an AI, including some that are currently under sanctions, so we can't legally mention them here.

email.question: Does Oatmeal replace my email client?
email.answer: Absolutely. The idea is that we transition you away from email entirely, so you become completely dependent on our service. Like a parasite living off a host.

pricing.title: Pricing to fit your business needs.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Oatmeal, Inc. ("we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, and shares information about you when you use our websites, applications, and other online products and services (collectively, the "Services") or when you otherwise interact with us.

collect.heading: Information We Collect
collect.intro: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you:

items.0: Create an account or fill out a form
items.1: Communicate with us via email, chat, or other channels
items.2: Participate in surveys, promotions, or other interactive features
items.3: Request customer support or otherwise communicate with us

collect.outro: The types of information we may collect include your name, email address, postal address, phone number, and any other information you choose to provide.

collectAutomatically.heading: Information We Collect Automatically
collectAutomatically.intro: When you access or use our Services, we automatically collect certain information, including:

log.label: Log Information:
log.text: We collect information about your use of the Services, including the type of browser you use, access times, pages viewed, your IP address, and the page you visited before navigating to our Services.

device.label: Device Information:
device.text: We collect information about the computer or mobile device you use to access our Services, including the hardware model, operating system and version, unique device identifiers, and mobile network information.

location.label: Location Information:
location.text: We may collect information about the location of your device based on your IP address or, with your consent, more precise location information from your mobile device.

use.heading: Use of Information
use.intro: We use the information we collect to:

items.0: Provide, maintain, and improve our Services
items.1: Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages
items.2: Respond to your comments, questions, and requests
items.3: Communicate with you about products, services, offers, and events
items.4: Monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities in connection with our Services
items.5: Detect, investigate, and prevent fraud and other illegal activities

sharing.heading: Sharing of Information
sharing.intro: We may share information about you as follows or as otherwise described in this Privacy Policy:

items.0: With vendors, consultants, and other service providers who need access to such information to carry out work on our behalf
items.1: In response to a request for information if we believe disclosure is in accordance with, or required by, any applicable law, regulation, or legal process
items.2: If we believe your actions are inconsistent with our user agreements or policies, or to protect the rights, property, and safety of us or others
items.3: In connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business by another company
items.4: With your consent or at your direction

retention.heading: Data Retention
retention.body: We retain personal information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy any legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. To determine the appropriate retention period, we consider the amount, nature, and sensitivity of the information, the potential risk of harm from unauthorized use or disclosure, and applicable legal requirements.

rights.heading: Your Rights and Choices
rights.body1: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also have the right to restrict or object to certain processing of your information. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided below.
rights.body2: You may opt out of receiving promotional communications from us by following the instructions in those messages. If you opt out, we may still send you non-promotional communications, such as those about your account or our ongoing business relations.

cookies.heading: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.body: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect information about your browsing activities and to distinguish you from other users of our Services. This aids your experience when you browse our Services and also allows us to improve our site. Most web browsers are set to accept cookies by default. You can usually choose to set your browser to remove or reject browser cookies, but this may affect your ability to use certain features of our Services.

security.heading: Security
security.body: We take reasonable measures to help protect information about you from loss, theft, misuse, and unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction. However, no internet or email transmission is ever fully secure or error-free.

children.heading: Children's Privacy
children.body: Our Services are not directed to children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16. If we learn that we have collected personal information from a child under 16, we will take steps to delete such information.

international.heading: International Data Transfers
international.body: Your information may be transferred to, and maintained on, computers located outside of your state, province, country, or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction. If you are located outside the United States and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the information to the United States and process it there.

changes.heading: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may change this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make changes, we will notify you by revising the date at the top of the policy and, in some cases, we may provide you with additional notice (such as adding a statement to our homepage or sending you a notification).

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at
